name: pulse-coder
description: Plugin-based AI coding assistant - Pulse Coder

scripts.preview:teams: pnpm --filter pulse-coder-orchestrator build && pnpm --filter pulse-coder-engine build && pnpm --filter pulse-coder-agent-teams build && pnpm --filter @pulse-coder/teams-cli preview
scripts.preview:teams:run: pnpm --filter pulse-coder-orchestrator build && pnpm --filter pulse-coder-engine build && pnpm --filter pulse-coder-agent-teams build && pnpm --filter @pulse-coder/teams-cli preview:run
scripts.preview:teams:plan: pnpm --filter pulse-coder-orchestrator build && pnpm --filter pulse-coder-engine build && pnpm --filter pulse-coder-agent-teams build && pnpm --filter @pulse-coder/teams-cli preview:plan
